page_content:
Prerequisite: Completion of on-line registration form.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.

Formerly: EDPL288.

EDHI488 Special Topics in Education Policy and Administration (1-3 Credits)

Special and intensive treatment of current topics and issues in education policy and administration.

Restriction: Permission of EDUC-Counseling, Higher Education and Special Education department.
